meta.title: About Dean · A Sailor Just Like You | Dean on Deck
meta.description: I'm Dean, a Sailor just like you. My Virgin experience changed my life — now I'm a Gold-Certified First Mate helping pros and first-timers alike sail better, with zero booking fees.
meta.ogTitle: Meet Dean — your Virgin Voyages First Mate
meta.ogDescription: A Sailor first. Booked in the last 30 days? Dean can run the numbers on adding him as your First Mate — and he books other cruise lines too.

hero.heading: I'm Dean, a Sailor *just like you.*
hero.lede: My Virgin experience honestly changed my life, and it's the reason I became a Travel Advisor (First Mate).
hero.photoAlt: Dean waving from the pier with a Virgin Voyages ship towering behind him

letter.intro: If your current First Mate isn't quite meeting your needs, I would love the opportunity to earn your trust and your business.

flag.heading: Did you book a voyage in the last 30 days?
flag.body: If you haven't paid in full yet, I'd be happy to run the numbers to see if adding me as your First Mate offers you a better advantage.
flag.fine: You keep your cabin, rate, and confirmation number — only the agency of record changes.

letter.afterFlag: Whether you are a seasoned sailor who prefers booking independently or a first-timer, I am here to help:

duo.body: Let me handle the unexpected stress and phone calls so you don't have to.
I'll listen and guide you to an itinerary that creates lifelong memories and new friends.

letter.other: Not looking at Virgin Voyages right now? I also book with [other cruise lines](/cruises) for your cruising adventures!
letter.thanks: Thank you for considering me and for suggesting my services to your fellow sailors. Let's set sail! ⚓
letter.role: Dean Satterfield · Gold-Certified Virgin Voyages First Mate

proof.heading: I sail the ships *I sell.*
proof.lede: Every photo on this site is from my own sailings. When I recommend a ship, a cabin, or a Shore Thing, it's because I've stood there — camera in hand.

strip.alt: Dean beside the carved eagle at the Sitka, Alaska welcome sign
Dean in red light under the Scarlet Night neon sign on board
Dean dockside in front of the Swiftsure catamaran in Port Townsend
Dean's selfie beneath the Space Needle against a clear blue sky

cta.heading: Let's find *your voyage.*
cta.lede: Call or text with a question, or send me your trip and I'll come back with real numbers — usually the same day.
